title: Saturn's Scythe
description: Re-textures the mace into a scythe!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a745f74b575c8916aae96b7d8899bf74073cb68.png)

Now you’re probably wondering — who is Saturn?
He’s often seen as the god of death, and you might know him by other names: Hades, Kronos, Satan, the Grim Reaper, Hela, Anubis, Thanatos — and more. Different cultures, same dark figure.

This resource pack gives the mace a full visual makeover, transforming it into a sleek, ominous scythe. While the weapon’s function remains the same in-game, its new look adds a dark, dramatic flair. It’s perfect for players who want their gear to feel more powerful, eerie, or themed — whether you’re roleplaying a reaper or just want something cooler than the default design.

**Subscribe to my YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@OasisSucksAtMc?sub_confirmation=1
